flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 30% at Upper Iowa University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.0k vs 2.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Upper Iowa University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3k → 2.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Upper Iowa University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (38.6% → 33.9%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Upper Iowa University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (28.3% → 25.0%).
